citation: Price Control and Anti-Profiteering Act 2011 — Section 10
summary: Promotional pricing must reflect genuine savings; strikethrough and limited-time offers must not mislead consumers.
review_guidance: TRIGGER: Was/now pricing, percentage off, or limited-time discount claims. ACTION: WARN — verify price history and offer terms. CHECK: Reference price period, currency, and exclusions. ESCALATE IF: Inflated reference price or fake urgency.
